events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the missing load reactor on long motor leads is flagged as a **fail** (non-compliant, high risk) — the likely fault mechanism is reflected-wave voltage transients from PWM switching on unprotected long cable runs, which stress motor winding insulation and bearings absent the reactor mandated by manufacturer lead-length tables (enforceable via NEC 110.3(B)). Corrective actions center on verifying lead length against mfr limits, installing the correct reactor/filter, and insulation-testing the motor before return to service.
